name: synapse2
description: MCP server for Docker and SSH host management — exposes flux (Docker/container/compose/host) and scout (SSH exec/filesystem/ZFS/logs) tools across configured infrastructure hosts.
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40080 for local use; set to https://synapse2.yourdomain.com for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: synapse_hosts_config
settings.description: Inline host topology as a JSON array, mapped to SYNAPSE_HOSTS_CONFIG. Highest-priority host source: when set it overrides SYNAPSE_CONFIG_FILE and the ~/.ssh/config fallback. Leave empty to load hosts from a config file or ~/.ssh/config.

settings.name: synapse_config_file
settings.description: Path to a hosts config file, mapped to SYNAPSE_CONFIG_FILE. Used when synapse_hosts_config is empty; if neither is set, the server falls back to ~/.ssh/config.
